name: QA 1845
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1845

pmlogger_daily for pmproxy-pushed archives (like 1698)

- rewrite and merge testing

- see qa/1869 for cull and compress testing

**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2404-container reproduce
